description_long: This is a beaded necklace displayed on a classic jewelry bust stand. The necklace features a series of round beads, each with a glossy, multicolored surface, arranged symmetrically along a fine, dark chain. The beads appear to be made of glass or polished stone, with hues of blue, white, and hints of red and orange, giving the piece a vibrant yet elegant appearance. The chain is delicate and likely metallic, providing a subtle contrast to the more prominent beads. The jewelry bust is made of a smooth, matte material, likely plastic or resin, and is designed to showcase the necklace in a retail or exhibition setting. The overall presentation is refined, highlighting the necklace as the focal point.
description: A vibrant beaded necklace with multicolored glossy beads on a fine dark chain, displayed on a smooth jewelry bust. The design is elegant and eye-catching, with a focus on the colorful beads.
description_view_0: Front view of the jewelry bust with the necklace partially visible, showing the chain and a central bead.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bust and the side alignment of the necklace beads.
description_view_2: Direct front view of the necklace, clearly displaying the full arrangement of multicolored beads along the chain.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the necklace's side profile and the curvature of the bust.
